mapper.select: SELECT r.*, oi.fruit_name, oi.fruit_image, oi.spec_name FROM order_review r LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.id WHERE r.order_item_id = #{orderItemId}
SELECT r.*, oi.fruit_name, oi.fruit_image, oi.spec_name FROM order_review r LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.id WHERE r.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_review (order_id, user_id, order_item_id, fruit_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{orderItemId}, #{fruitId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_review WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
